title: Putin Retaliates With New Strikes After Ukraine Takes the War to Russia
summary_full: Ukraine is taking the war to Russia, but so far President Vladimir V. Putin’s response has been to keep attacking, including with deadly ballistic missile and drone strikes in Kyiv on Thursday.
summary_public: Ukraine is taking the war to Russia, but so far President Vladimir V. Putin’s response has been to keep attacking, including with deadly ballistic missile and drone strikes in Kyiv on Thursday.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Putin Retaliates With New Strikes After Ukraine Takes the War to Russia
